content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学预计于9月29日08:00~12:00（UTC+8）进行校内设施维护。
       维护结束后需要重新登入并更新资源，补给物资将会通过信件向守密人发放。若有任何疑问，欢迎通过校区内客服中心咨询，感谢您的理解与支持！
    
【补给物资】
停服维护补偿：银芯×200、无垢之芯×5
     
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年10月13日09:00。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【玩法活动：如果一切如常】
● 在 10 月 6 日 9:00 - 10 月 20 日 9:00 期间，玩法活动「如果一切如常」开放！
    ○ 活动期间异梦视界「再见，永无乡」免费解锁开启。
    ○ 攻略活动至多可获得「流明之芯」×5、「无垢之芯」×5、「银芯」×600、「贤石碎屑」×255、「拟态凝晶」×240、「群星余梦」×5、「碎裂余梦」×33、「融蚀之珠」×4000、「黑色贡物」×4000、「调查徽章」×4000 等奖励。
 
【异梦视界：再见，永无乡】
● 「异梦视界」新增篇章「再见，永无乡」！
    ○ 永无乡只在梦中，而梦的构筑者正在无数幅心理侧写的背后，静静等候着你的抉择和回应……
● 通关后，即可获得全新钥令「美梦一刹」。
    ○ 钥令效果：获得 116 点护盾和当前护盾 10% 的临时力量。
● 推荐先通关异梦视界「再见永无乡」以获得最佳体验。
 
【特别纪行：假日纪行】
● 在 10 月 6 日 9:00 - 10 月 20 日 9:00 期间，特别纪行「假日纪行」活动限时开放！
    ○ 完成所有免费纪行任务累计可免费获得：「无垢之芯」×10，「银芯」×800。
    ○ 购买进阶纪行需要「源液」×788。购买后，完成所有进阶纪行任务累计可额外获得：环行·拉蒙娜的全新幻衣「幻梦假日」，「流明之芯」×30，「灵核碎片」×25。
    ○ 活动结束后，环行·拉蒙娜的幻衣「幻梦假日」将在「幻衣订购」中上架，价格为 「源液」×980。
 
【限时唤醒：久远的呼唤】
● 在  10 月 6 日 9:00 - 11 月 3 日 9:00 期间，自选活动唤醒「久远的呼唤」限时开放！
    ○ 可在所有「忘却篇」限定唤醒体与对应推荐命轮中任选一组加入自选卡池。
    ○ 选定唤醒体后，该唤醒体与对应推荐命轮的唤醒获得概率将发生提升。
    ○ 保底规则升级！现在只需每获取 2 次SSR奖励，就至少包含 1 次所选限定唤醒体或对应推荐命轮！
    ○ 当未能获取 UP 奖励时，现在会以均等的机会获得常驻 SSR 命轮和 SSR 唤醒体。
    ○ 若连续 2 次获取相同的 UP 奖励，则下次通过唤醒获取的选定奖励必定为另一个不同的UP奖励。
    ○ 参与往期「久远的呼唤」的守密人会在更新后依据新旧保底规则差异，得到追溯补偿的保底计数。
 
【限时唤醒：千幕游记】
● 在 10 月 6 日 9:00 - 11 月 3 日 9:00 期间，活动唤醒「千幕游记」限时开放！
    ○ 可随机获取所有「忘却篇」限定唤醒体和限定命轮的超值卡池。
    ○ 若连续 2 次获取 SSR 命轮后，则下次通过唤醒获取的 SSR 奖励必定为 SSR 唤醒体。
    ○ 若连续 2 次获取 SSR 唤醒体后，则下次通过唤醒获取的 SSR 奖励必定为 SSR 命轮。
 
【学园活动：第 23 期】
● 在 10 月 6 日 9:00 - 10 月 20 日 9:00 期间，以下学园活动限时开放！
    ○ 累计登录 7 天即可领取「流明之芯」×10 的丰厚奖励！累计登录 14 天可获得其他奖励！
    ○ 本期核心课题限定奖励：头像「永不褪色的昨天：环行·拉蒙娜」、头像「永不褪色的昨天：潘狄娅」、表情「校园生活篇：环行·拉蒙娜·来了」、表情「校园生活篇：环行·拉蒙娜·走了」、表情「和平的一天：艾继丝·晚安」、表情「课余时间篇：莉莉·伸手」。
    ○ 本期相位对弈限定奖励：表情「弥萨格日常：墨菲·生闷气」、表情「比心弥萨格：旺达·比心」、表情「校园生活篇：汀克特·唱歌」、表情「小小弥萨格：哈姆林·冷漠」。
    ○ 本期学院活动仅持续14天，期间完成每日任务、每周任务和学期任务获得的课题经验翻倍。

二、综合
【一般】
● 与「幻衣」相关的商店、唤醒、唤醒体查看等界面中，增加了幻衣的星级展示。目前所有简易幻衣的星级都为 1 ☆，本次环行·拉蒙娜的幻衣「幻梦假日」星级为 2 ☆。
● 「幕间演习-唤醒体试玩」中常驻唤醒体的「前往唤醒」按钮位置移动到了右上角，使唤醒体的「能力介绍」有更多的文本展示空间。
● 「原型视界」选择唤醒体残片领取按钮的文字现在更容易看清了。
● 用移动设备游玩时收到的通知文字现在会跟随语言设定变化而变化了。
 
【故事】
● 「意识潜游」各篇章解锁条件下调为通关「调查行动忘却篇1-2」，通关「骑士的愿望」仅仅作其他篇章的「最佳剧情体验提示」中的前置内容。
● 「最佳剧情体验提示」界面中，增加了跳转至前置剧情的按钮。
● 「特遣记录」、「异梦视界」、「多维链接」的解锁条件下调为通关「调查行动忘却篇1-2」。
● 「多维链接-逆转回合」增加了前置建议剧情：通关「调查行动忘却篇第三章」
● 「意识潜游-一步之遥」增加了前置建议剧情：通关「调查行动忘却篇第四章」。
● 「异梦视界-再见永无乡」增加了前置建议剧情：通关「调查行动星辰篇第一章」。
● 「异梦视界-征厨房记」增加了前置建议剧情：通关「意识潜游-血与沙」和「意识潜游-苍白后裔」。
 
【战斗】
● 敌人「超脱之俯仰」、「求诸己身」施加的「狂气吸收」效果现在统一描述为「空虚」。
● 唤醒体「拉蒙娜」、「奥吉尔」、「朵尔」、「萝坦」的战斗音效得到了优化，在 2 倍速下表现更佳。
● 唤醒体详情的灵知觉醒图标有所调整，现在不再附加文字，在各个语言设置下都能正常显示。
 
【相位对弈】
● 机制「缠绕」与「破绽」重做、唤醒体「卡斯托尔」与「凯蒂古拉」重做。
● 其他大量卡牌的数值或效果也发生了变化，详略，具体调整请在更新后前往游戏中确认。

三、问题修复
● 修复了钥令「虚世之彩」施放时，若皮克曼在队伍中且已觉醒，未能正确触发其灵知觉醒的胚胎融合获取效果的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「宁菲亚」释放超限爆发后，狂气爆发「自我的葬仪」与技能「丧钟遥鸣」施加的中毒会额外享受一次 50% 加成的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「宁菲亚」灵知觉醒后，技能「夜潮汹涌」以及「命轮」造成的中毒效果未能享受额外中毒加成的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「索蕾尔」激活启灵1「溪流」后且当前生命低于 50％ 时，「防御」未高亮提示的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「克莱门汀」狂气爆发「生命重构治疗」在激活启灵2「灵魂治愈之旅」后，「银钥能量」成长描述与实际技能效果不符的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「哈姆林」技能「追忆回旋曲」算力消耗不高于玩家当前算力时，某些情况下错误的拥有红色光效提示的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「旺达」技能「脊刺锁链」伤害特效错误出现在己方的问题，现在会正确出现在敌人上了。  
● 修复了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「卡斯托尔」，「熔毁·朵尔」，「克莱门汀」，「克珀珊特」，「凯蒂古拉」部分特效位置显示不正确的问题。
● 修复了「星辰篇」第一章共鸣点「堆栈处理」描述错误的问题。正确的描述为：回合结束时，「备用脑缸」中 1 张算力消耗最高的卡牌算力消耗降低 2 点。
● 修复了「星辰篇」探索造物升级界面，造物信息文本显示不完整的问题。
● 修复了「星辰篇」探索中的「褪色遗骨」处选择「安葬」时会错误需要强制删除 1 张卡牌的问题，现在可以选择不删除任何卡牌。
● 修复了敌人「美德骑士」和「相位对弈」中奥吉尔的影子显示方向错误的问题。
● 修复了敌人「美德骑士」作为「精英」出现时，状态「骑士的信仰」失去护盾时获得的加固层数显示错误的问题。
● 修复了敌人「永恒奏者」释放意图「灵魂序曲」时，后续释放的「灵魂序曲」造成的伤害次数未能正确增加的问题。
● 修复了「课题纪录」双倍经验期间，核心课题可获得的课题等级数量显示错误的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒」界面中有时信息未完整显示的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒体档案」中唤醒体「索蕾尔」缺少 「打击·一」和「防御·二」语音的问题。‘
● 修复了玩法活动「名侦探手册」中，商店售罄物品没有置于底部的问题。
● 修复了意识潜游「不朽极昼」、「再见永无乡」、「畸世绘」中的错别字。
● 修复了「通讯器」中「哈姆林」的对话内容可能卡住的问题。
● 修复了「通讯器」中「克珀珊特」对话中的错别字。
● 修复了「通讯器」中对话对象名字在部分语言中显示不全的问题。
● 修复了「融灾禁区」中「挑战」按钮在部分语言中文字错误换行的问题。
● 修复了「道具」详情信息提示出现时的错误动画效果。
● 修复了「相位对弈」结算时，命轮名称在部分语言设置情况下有时显示不完全的问题。
● 修复了「大厅」界面中唤醒体对话文字有时未完整显示的问题。
● 修复了「手册-行动报告」第七阶段的激活任意唤醒体天赋任务未能追溯历史激活天赋的问题。如果此前已经激活过任意唤醒体天赋，现在解锁对应阶段后无需再次激活。
● 修复了「历程追思献礼·星辰篇」领取奖励时获得物资有时显示错误的问题。实际领取的奖励是正确的。
● 修复了 PC 版「设置-按键」中多次更改按键设置时按键可能错乱的问题。
 
四、英文本地化
● 优化了主线剧情序章至第五章的英语翻译。
● 优化了以下唤醒体的语音台词翻译：「塔薇」，「环行·拉蒙娜」，「克莱门汀」，「墨菲」。
● 优化了约 8000 条活动商店，界面，成就文本的翻译、修正措辞不一致的问题。
● 优化了战斗探索界面左侧成就文本的字间距。
● 修复了融灾禁区界面「挑战」按钮文本错误换行、通关队伍文本重叠的问题。
● 修复了部分敌人信息界面的故事文本错误截断的问题。
● 修复了战斗探索中部分道具描述错误截断的问题。

**V2.3.3.0 Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
Mythag University is scheduled to conduct campus facility maintenance from 08:00 to 12:00 on September 29 (UTC+8).
You can enter the game once the maintenance is complete. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Server Maintenance Compensation: Silver×200, Pure Core×5
  
[Claim Conditions]
The collection period ends on October 13, 2025 at 09:00. Please remember to check your mailbox in time to collect the supplies.
 
[Update Content]
1. Activity
[Gameplay Event: If Life Was As Usual]
● The gameplay event "If Life Was As Usual" is open from October 6th, 9:00 AM to October 20th, 9:00 AM!
    ○ During the event, the Dreamscape "See You, Neverland" is unlocked for free.
    ○ The strategy event can yield up to "Luminous Core" ×5, "Pure Core" ×5, "Silver" ×600, "Aetheric Shard" ×255, "Mimetic Crystal" ×240, "Dreamspark" ×5, "Dreamshard" ×33, "D-Jewel" ×4000, "Black Offering" ×4000, "Investigation Badge" ×4000 and other rewards.

[Dreamscape: See You, Neverland]
● New chapter "See You, Neverland" added to "Dreamscape"!
    ○ The Land of No Return exists only in dreams, while the builders of those dreams quietly wait for your choice and response behind countless psychological sketches...
● Upon clearing, you will receive the brand new Posse "A Fleeting Dream".
    ○ Posse Effect: Gain 116 points of Shield and Temporary STR equal to 10% of current Shield.
● It is recommended to complete the Dreamscape "See You in Neverland" for the best experience.

[Special Chronicle: Holiday Chronicle]
● The special event "Survey Chronicle" will be available for a limited time from October 6, 9:00 to October 20, 9:00!
    ○ Completing all free journey tasks will grant you the following rewards for free: "Pure Core" ×10, "Silver" ×800.
    ○ Purchasing the Advanced Chronicle requires Silver Prime ×788. After purchase, completing all tasks in the Advanced Chronicle will grant additional rewards: a new Phantom Garment "Dreamy Vacation" for Ramona: Timeworn, Luminous Core ×30, and Gnosis Fragment ×25.
    ○ After the event ends, the garment "Dreamy Vacation" of Ramona: Timeworn will be available in "Garment Ordering" for "Silver Prime" × 980.

[Limited-Time Awakening: The Timeless Call]
● The Self-Select Event Awakening "The Timeless Call" is available for a limited time from October 6th, 9:00 to November 3rd, 9:00!
    ○ You can choose one set from all the limited Awakeners in the "Faded Legacy" and the corresponding recommended Wheel of Destiny to add to your selected card pool.
    ○ After selecting an Awakener, the awakening probability of that Awakener and the corresponding recommended Wheel of Destiny will be increased.
    ○ The guaranteed rule has been upgraded! Now, every time you obtain 2 SSR rewards, it will include at least 1 selected limited Awakener or the corresponding recommended Wheel of Destiny!
    ○ When unable to obtain the UP reward, you will now have an equal chance to receive a permanent SSR Wheel of Destiny and an SSR Awakener.
    ○ If you obtain the same UP reward consecutively twice, the next selected reward obtained through Awaken will definitely be a different UP reward.
    ○ Keepers who participated in past "The Timeless Call" will receive a retrospective compensation base count after the update based on the differences between the new and old guaranteed rules.

[Limited-Time Awakening: Kaleido Recollections]
● The event "Kaleido Recollections" will be available for limited-time awakening from October 6, 9:00 to November 3, 9:00!
    ○ You can randomly obtain all limited Awakeners and limited Wheels of Destiny from the "Faded Legacy" premium card pool.
    ○ If you obtain an SSR Wheel of Destiny twice in a row, the next SSR reward obtained through awakening will definitely be an SSR Awakener.
    ○ If you obtain SSR Awakeners two times in a row, the next SSR reward obtained through awakening will definitely be an SSR Wheel of Destiny.

[Mythag Events: Season 23]
● The following Mythag Events will be available for a limited time from October 6, 9:00 AM to October 20, 9:00 AM!
    ○ Log in for a total of 7 days to receive a generous reward of "Luminous Core" ×10! Log in for a total of 14 days to obtain other rewards!
    ○ Limited rewards for this issue's Premium Topics: Avatar "Unfading Yesterday: Ramona: Timeworn", Avatar "Unfading Yesterday: Pandia", Emote "School Life: Ramona: Here", Emote "School Life: Ramona: Gone", Emote "Peaceful Day: Aigis: Good Night", Emote "After School: Lily: Reaching Out".
    ○ Limited rewards for this issue of Traphase: Emote "Mythag Daily: Murphy - Sulking", Emote "Heart Gesture Mythag: Wanda - Heart Gesture", Emote "School Life: Tinct - Singing", Emote "Little Mythag: Hameln - Indifferent".
    ○ This period's Mythag Event lasts only 14 days, during which the quest experience gained from completing Daily Tasks, Weekly Tasks, and Semester Tasks is doubled.

2. Comprehensive
[Normal]
● In the interfaces related to "Phantom Garments," such as shops, awakening, and viewing Awakeners, a star level display for Phantom Garments has been added. Currently, all simple Phantom Garments have a star level of 1 ☆, while the star level for Ramona: Timeworn's Phantom Garment "Dreamy Vacation" is 2 ☆.
● In the "Interlude - Awakener Trial," the "Go Awaken" button for permanent Awakeners has been moved to the top right corner, allowing more text display space for the "Ability Introduction" of the Awakener.
● The text on the button to select Awakener Fragments in the "Prototype Horizon" is now easier to read.
● The notification text received while playing on mobile devices will now change according to the language settings.

[Story]
● The unlock conditions for each chapter of "Psyche Deepdive" have been adjusted to clear "Investigation Faded Legacy 1-2," and clearing "A Knight's Wish" is now merely a prerequisite for the "Best Storyline Experience Hint" in other chapters.
● In the "Best Story Experience Hint" interface, a button to jump to the prerequisite storyline has been added.
● The unlocking conditions for "Special Operation," "Dreamscape," and "Multiverse Link" are lowered to clearing "Investigation Faded Legacy 1-2."
● "Multiverse Link - My Turn" has added a prerequisite story suggestion: Complete "Investigation Faded Legacy Chapter 3"
● "Psyche Deepdive - One Step Away" has added a prerequisite storyline recommendation: complete "Investigation Oblivion Chapter 4."
● "Dreamscape - See You in Neverland" has added a prerequisite storyline suggestion: Clear "Investigation Astral Reign Chapter 1".
● "Dreamscape - Culinary Domination" has added prerequisite storyline recommendations: Complete "Psyche Deepdive - Blood and Sand" and "Psyche Deepdive - Pale Descendant".

[Battle]
● The effects of "Aliemus Absorb" applied by the enemy's "Transcendent Gaze" and "Find the Answer Within" are now uniformly described as "Void".
● The battle sound effects for Awakeners "Ramona," "Ogier," "Doll," and "Lotan" have been optimized, performing better at 2x speed.
● The Gnosis Rouse icon for Awakener details has been adjusted and no longer includes text, displaying correctly across all language settings.

[Traphase]
● Mechanic "Entwined" and "Falter" reworked, Awakener "Castor" and "Kathigu-Ra" reworked.
● The values or effects of many other cards have also changed. For details, please confirm in the game after the update.

3. Problem Fix
● Fixed the issue where the Posse "Colors of the Virtual World" did not correctly trigger the Gnosis Rouse's Embryo Fusion gain effect when Pickman was in the team and had already been roused.
● Fixed an issue where the Exalt "Passage of the Ego" and the skill "Knell of Death" applied by the Awakener "Nymphaea" would receive an additional 50% bonus for the Poison effect after unleashing Over-Exaltation.
● Fixed the issue where the skill "Midnight Tide" and "Wheel of Destiny" did not benefit from additional Poison bonuses after the Awakener "Nymphaea" underwent Gnosis Awakening.
● Fixed the issue where the "Defence" hint was not highlighted when the Awakener "Sorel" activated Enlighten 1 "Flowing Rill" and current HP was below 50%.
● Fixed the issue where the "Lifeform Reconstruction" skill of Awakener "Clementine" during Exaltation did not match the actual skill effect after activating Enlighten 2 "Soul Healing Journey" regarding the description of "Keyflare" growth.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Hameln" skill "Memory Rondo" incorrectly displayed a red light effect when its Arithmetica cost was not higher than the player's current Arithmetica in certain situations.
● Fixed the issue where the damage effect of the Awakener "Wanda" skill "Spine Needle Chains" appeared on our side; it will now correctly appear on the enemy
● Fixed the issue with incorrect display of some special effects positions for the Awakeners "Castor," "Meltdown: Dor," "Clementine," "Corposant," and "Kathigu-Ra" in "Traphase."
● Fixed the description error of the Resonance Point "Stack Processing" in Chapter 1 of "Astral Reign". The correct description is: At the end of the turn, reduce the Arithmetica cost of 1 card with the highest Arithmetica cost in the "Spare Brain Vat" by 2.

● Fixed the issue where the Relic information text was not fully displayed in the Astral Reign exploration upgrade interface.
● Fixed an issue in the "Astral Reign" exploration where selecting "Interment" at the "Faded Bone" location would incorrectly require the forced deletion of 1 card; it is now possible to choose not to delete any cards.
● Fixed the issue with the shadow display direction of the enemy "Virtue Knight" and "Traphase" Ogier.
● Fixed an issue where the "Knight's Faith" status granted incorrect stacks of Fortress when the enemy "Virtue Knight" appeared as an "Elite" and lost Shield.
● Fixed an issue where the number of damage instances from the subsequent "Soul Overture" released after the enemy "Eternal Performer" used the intention "Soul Overture" was not correctly increased.
● Fixed the issue where the number of quest levels obtainable from Premium Topics was displayed incorrectly during the Double EXP period in the "Curriculum".
● Fixed the issue where information was sometimes not fully displayed on the "Awaken" interface.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Sorel" was missing "Strike: I" and "Defence: II" voice lines in the "Awakener Archive."
● Fixed the issue where sold-out items in the gameplay event "Detective Handbook" were not placed at the bottom of the shop.
● Fixed typos in Psyche Deepdive "Everburning Vex," "See You in Neverland," and "Ghastly Canvas."
● Fixed the issue where the dialogue content of "Hameln" in the "Communicator" could get stuck.
● Fixed the typos in the dialogue of "Corposant" in the "Communicator".

● Fixed the issue where the dialogue partner's name was not fully displayed in the "Communicator" in some languages.
● Fixed the issue of incorrect line breaks for the "Challenge" button text in some languages in the "D-Effect Zone."
● Fixed the error animation effect when the "Item" detail information prompt appears.
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny name sometimes did not display completely in certain language settings during Traphase settlement.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener dialogue text was sometimes not fully displayed in the "Lobby" interface.
● Fixed the issue where the task to activate any Awakener Talent in "Manual - Mission Report" Chapter 7 did not retroactively activate previously activated talents. If any Awakener Talent has been activated before, there is no need to activate it again after unlocking the corresponding stage.
● Fixed the issue where the rewards received from "Echoed Pilgrimage · Astral Reign" sometimes displayed incorrect materials when claiming. The actual rewards received are correct.
● Fixed the issue where key mappings might become disordered when changing key settings multiple times in the PC version of "Settings - Key Binding."

4. English Localization
● Reworked the English translation of the main story from the Prologue to Chapter 5.
● Optimized the voice lines translation for the following Awakeners: Tawil, Ramona: Timeworn, Clementine, Murphy.
● Optimized the translation of approximately 8,000 activity store, interface, and achievement texts, correcting inconsistencies in phrasing.
● Optimized the letter spacing of the achievement text on the left side of the level exploration interface.
● Fixed the issue of incorrect line breaks for the "Challenge" button on the D-Effect Zone interface and overlapping text.
● Fixed the issue of text truncation in the monster story on the monster information interface during battle.
● Fixed the issue of truncated descriptions for some items in battle exploration.
